meta.title: EgoANT × WGO-Bench HomER 标注消融长报告
meta.metric_label: Gemini-3.5-Flash judge accuracy on gold boundaries
meta.metric_e2e: Semantic E2E F1 (IoU match then Gemini-3.5-Flash judge)
meta.model_note: 分段/标注模型仍为 Qwen 栈；语义打分已按 WGO/Macrodata 口径改用 Gemini-3.5-Flash judge。文中「Qwen3.6-27B」与日志里的 28B endpoint 指同一小模型服务。

best.seg_config: Qwen3.6-27B · S2 pad=0 + full-cover local prompt · contact sheet
best.label_config: Qwen3.6-27B raw labels · Gemini-3.5-Flash judge (fixed gold boundaries)
best.e2e_config: S2 full-cover boundaries + Qwen3.5-397B multi-candidate selector · Gemini-3.5-Flash judge

meta.generated_note: All main Label Acc and Semantic E2E entries are rescored with Gemini-3.5-Flash judge; Segment F1 remains pure temporal IoU.

glossary.def: 按固定间隔抽帧拼成的时间戳联系表，用于分段；默认 0.5s×约20格≈10s 窗。
把 past/current/future 的整帧格子拼在一起给标注模型；≠ contact sheet。
把上一/当前/下一子任务的 sheet 一起喂给标注模型。
HomER 无 hand asset 时用 YOLO 腕点或画面中心 proxy 裁手部拼图；失败线。
先跑 HaWoR 得 wrist track，再按手部点裁剪；固定边界标注微涨线。
用光流质心近似手部叠图；不是真 hand overlay。
Macrodata 用自动搜索得到的英文分段 prompt 规则集（不是新模型）；推理时只是把这些规则贴进请求。
提高切段密度以抬召回；易过分割。
粗分后再对局部时间窗口精修；pad=0 表示不外扩；full-cover 要求盖住该时间窗口内完成事件。
对同一边界生成多条候选标签，再由大模型选一条定稿。
分段主模型；日志里有时写作 28B endpoint，本文统一 27B。
标注 / judge / selector 用的大模型。
本报告评测子集：25 集第一视角 episode、470 个 gold 段。

segmentation.name: EgoANT 原管线：rule-based 腕速切段 + merge
segmentation.note: 过分割：预测段远多于 gold

method.goal: 用手腕速度谷值自动切子任务
method.how: HaWoR/腕速找 minima → 短段策略 → merge judge
method.verdict: 启发式过碎，作基线

segmentation.name: Contact sheet 分片（max_sheets=3，每次最多 3 张）
segmentation.note: 分片接缝处出现假边界

method.goal: 模仿 blog：把长视频切成多张 sheet 分次送模型
method.how: legacy prompt；每集最多 3 张 sheet，分次 API
method.verdict: 人工切窗边界被当成事件边界

segmentation.name: Contact sheet 分片（max_sheets=3）
segmentation.note: 同设置下小模型优于大模型分片版

method.goal: 同上，换小模型
method.how: 同 max3 + legacy
method.verdict: 更大模型≠自动更好；分片 recipe 本身有毒

segmentation.name: 整集一次 + legacy prompt（无 GEPA-searched 规则）

method.goal: 去掉分片接缝
method.how: max_sheets=0，整集 sheet 一次作为视觉输入提交给 API
method.verdict: 假切点没了，但切太少

segmentation.name: 整集一次 + GEPA-searched 规则 prompt
segmentation.note: 仍欠分割，但比 legacy 略好

method.goal: 用 completed-events + 时长先验对齐 blog 规则
method.how: GEPA-searched prompt：只标完成操作；偏好约 2–10s 段
method.verdict: 外形对齐有效，但仍欠分割

segmentation.name: S1：反欠分割（提高切段密度）
segmentation.note: 召回上升，但又切得过碎

method.goal: 纠正 GEPA 后切太少
method.how: 改 duration prior / 提高切段密度；全量 25 集
method.input: 整集 sheet + 反欠分割 prompt
method.verdict: 召回上来，过分割回来

segmentation.name: S2 早期精修（pad≈1，无 full-cover）
segmentation.note: 早期二次精修，尚未用 full-cover

method.goal: 粗分后再局部细切
method.how: 粗边界 → 局部时间窗口 contact sheet → 二次精修；early 配置 pad≈1.0
method.input: 局部 sheet + 粗段 hint
method.verdict: 方向对，但不是最终 full-cover

segmentation.name: S2 精修 pad=0（尚无 full-cover）

method.goal: 消融 pad 宽度
method.how: 局部精修，pad_sec=0，未加 full-cover 覆盖约束
method.verdict: pad=0 优于 pad=0.5/1/2，但仍过碎

segmentation.name: S2 精修 pad=0.5（时间窗口外扩）
segmentation.note: 把时间窗口外扩 0.5s，不如 pad=0

method.goal: 给局部时间窗口前后多看一点
method.how: pad_sec=0.5
method.verdict: 不如 pad=0

method.goal: 同上
method.how: pad_sec=1.0
method.verdict: 不如 pad=0

method.goal: 同上
method.how: pad_sec=2.0
method.verdict: 不如 pad=0

segmentation.name: S2 pad=0 + midpoint full-cover 后处理（非 prompt）
segmentation.note: 用算法补覆盖 ≠ 写进 prompt 的 full-cover

method.goal: 用算法把预测盖满时间轴
method.how: pad=0 预测后再做 midpoint full-cover postprocess
method.verdict: 不如把 full-cover 写进 local prompt

method.goal: 局部时间窗口内重切，并要求盖满该时间窗口、保持任务粒度
method.how: 粗分 GEPA → 滑动时间窗口/覆盖时间窗口 sheet（0.5s×20）→ pad=0 + full-cover prompt 只重切该时间窗口
method.input: 局部 timestamped contact sheet + 粗段 hint
method.verdict: Qwen 栈主升力；勿与 early S2 0.1674 混称

segmentation.name: 后处理：在 0.2031 上合并相邻「文案完全相同」段

method.goal: 合并相邻同文案碎片，让时间轴更干净
method.how: 相邻且 label 完全相同则合并
method.verdict: 时间轴更整洁但 F1 降低；不要默认 merge

segmentation.name: 后处理：在 0.2031 上按动词/物体合并相邻段

method.goal: 同动词/物体就合并
method.how: 解析 verb/object 近似匹配后合并
method.verdict: 继续降低 F1

segmentation.name: 后处理：在 0.2031 上跨短间隙桥接合并
segmentation.note: 跨短间隙合并，F1 降低最多

method.goal: 短间隙也桥接合并
method.how: 允许短时间桥接后合并
method.verdict: F1 降低最多

labeling.name: raw frames · Qwen3.6-27B
labeling.note: Best fixed-boundary label score after Gemini rescore.

method.goal: Test whether the smaller model can label fixed segments.
method.how: Same raw-frame input as the default labeler, but with Qwen3.6-27B.
method.verdict: Best fixed-boundary label setting under Gemini judge.

labeling.name: temporal collage · Qwen3.6-27B
labeling.note: Better than 397B collage, still below raw 27B.

method.goal: Test past/current/future context with the smaller model.
method.how: Build past/current/future whole-frame grids for each fixed gold segment.
method.verdict: Extra context helps less than simple raw frames.

labeling.name: proxy overlay · Qwen3.6-27B
labeling.note: Approximate overlay; not true hand reconstruction.

method.goal: Show the model approximate motion/hand-region cues.
method.how: Draw optical-flow / heuristic visual marks on raw frames, then label fixed gold segments.
method.verdict: Does not beat raw 27B; useful only as an ablation.

labeling.name: HaWoR true hand-crop · Qwen3.5-397B
labeling.note: Slightly above raw 397B, below raw 27B; requires reliable wrist tracks.

method.goal: Use real wrist tracks for hand crops.
method.how: Run HaWoR, build wrist tracks, crop around hands, and fall back to raw when crops are incomplete.
method.verdict: Small gain over raw 397B, not enough to beat raw 27B.

labeling.name: raw frames · Qwen3.5-397B
labeling.note: 397B raw baseline under the same Gemini judge.

method.goal: Evaluate label quality with fixed gold boundaries.
method.how: Uniformly sample raw frames per gold segment, label with 397B, then score with Gemini.
method.verdict: Stable baseline, but not the Gemini-rescored winner.

method.goal: Verify that the copied labeling artifact matches the traceable raw run.
method.how: Score the audit prediction file with the same Gemini judge.
method.verdict: No hidden gain; keep the traceable raw row as the baseline.

labeling.name: proxy overlay · Qwen3.5-397B
labeling.note: Visual marks hurt relative to raw 397B.

method.goal: Show the model approximate hand/motion location.
method.how: Use optical-flow / center-proxy visual marks because true hand tracks are unavailable for this proxy ablation.
method.verdict: Hurts score; do not present it as true hand overlay.

method.goal: Add whole-frame past/current/future context.
method.how: Create full-frame grids from past, current, and future windows for the same fixed segment.
method.verdict: Context noise outweighs benefit on HomER.

labeling.name: neighbor sheet + timestamps · Qwen3.5-397B
labeling.note: Adding timestamps did not fix neighbor-context pollution.

method.goal: Check whether missing timestamps caused neighbor-sheet failure.
method.how: Re-run previous/current/next sheets after adding second-level timestamps.
method.verdict: Timestamps help slightly, but the input design still hurts.

labeling.name: neighbor sheet · Qwen3.5-397B
labeling.note: The model often labels neighboring actions instead of the current one.

method.goal: Use previous/current/next segment context.
method.how: Feed PREV/CUR/NEXT contact sheets together to the labeler.
method.verdict: The model loses track of which action is current.

labeling.name: proxy hand-collage · Qwen3.5-397B
labeling.note: Approximate crop/collage is not true hand crop and performs poorly.

method.goal: Focus visual attention on hand-object regions.
method.how: Use approximate crop/collage proxies instead of reliable wrist tracks.
method.verdict: Approximate crops hurt and should not be conflated with HaWoR true hand-crop.

e2e.name: EgoANT production one-pass · Gemini judge
e2e.note: wrist-speed cuts + per-segment caption; weak under WGO E2E

method.goal: Measure the original one-pass cut-and-label path.
method.how: Rule-based wrist cuts followed by per-segment captions.
method.verdict: Weak end-to-end baseline under the WGO protocol.

method.goal: Keep the best boundaries but let the segmentation model self-label.
method.how: Use S2 full-cover boundaries and Qwen3.6-27B labels.
method.verdict: Better boundaries alone are not enough; labels remain weak.

e2e.name: S2 + 27B raw relabel · Gemini judge
e2e.note: semantic match 50; not the E2E winner

method.goal: Check whether the fixed-boundary Label Acc winner also wins E2E.
method.how: Use S2 boundaries, then relabel each predicted segment with raw frames and Qwen3.6-27B.
method.verdict: Better than self-label, but below 397B raw and selector.

method.goal: Lock boundaries and upgrade the labeler.
method.how: Use the same S2 boundaries, then let 397B caption raw frames.
method.verdict: Most single-path gain comes from the larger labeler.

method.goal: Test sensitivity to decode and sampling path.
method.how: Use ffmpeg-based frame extraction with the same S2 boundaries and 397B labeler.
method.verdict: Slightly better than the default raw path; useful as a candidate.

e2e.name: S2 + neighbor relabel (27B prior) · Gemini judge

method.goal: Try neighbor context with a small-model prior.
method.how: Feed previous/current/next frames plus a Qwen3.6-27B prior.
method.verdict: Context pollution lowers semantic accuracy while boundaries stay fixed.

e2e.name: S2 + neighbor relabel (397B prior) · Gemini judge
e2e.note: semantic match 58; tied with ffmpeg raw

method.goal: Try neighbor context with a stronger raw prior.
method.how: Feed previous/current/next frames plus a 397B raw prior.
method.verdict: Useful as a candidate, still below selector.

method.goal: Select among multiple candidate labels for the same boundary.
method.how: Generate candidates from raw, ffmpeg, seed, and prior variants, then let 397B select the final label.
method.verdict: Best current end-to-end result; higher call count.
